tool_args.label: Existing roadway conditions do not meet DOT standards

payload.claim_text: Existing roadway conditions do not meet current DOT standards for lane widths. Typical lane widths are 10'-11' for general travel lanes and 11'-12' for bus lanes.
payload.subject: 42nd Street roadway conditions

tool_args.label: M42 bus running time unreliable, varies 20-40 minutes

payload.claim_text: Bus running time is unreliable even within the same time period due to varying traffic conditions day to day. Runs can vary by 20-40 minutes, leading to bus bunching, long/unpredictable waits at the bus stop, and crowding on the bus
